rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage exhausted its USD budget on planning/exploration without producing any src/ files. Check remaining budget before starting implementation.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"If `git diff HEAD~1 --name-status` shows zero src/ changes, the build stage failed silently and no reviewable code exists.","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
